name: Fresh Spinach in Bean Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: Slice off the root end and half stem of spinach; wash completely and drain leaves. Wash chili pepper.
2. Mash fermented bean curd with thin soy sauce, mix with stock and sugar.
3. Stir-frying: Heat wok to very hot; add oil. When oil just begins to smoke, add 1/2 of the spinach and toss until it begins to wilt. Push wilted spinach up side of wok; add remaining spinach, and toss until it wilts.
4. Push all spinach out of bottom of wok; add chili and ginger; stir for about 10 seconds. Add liquid ingredients; stir. When liquids boil, thicken to medium consistency with cornstarch paste dribbles.
5. Recombine with spinach. Stir to coat spinach. Serve. Spinach should remain bright green until you pour in liquid.
